not_found: This test session could not be found.
banned_until: Your account is temporarily suspended until {date}. You can apply again after that date.
identity_blocked: Your account is being verified. Please contact support.
stripe_required: Please set up your payment account before applying.
onboarding_required: Please complete the setup of your bank account.
kyc_required: Identity verification is required to continue. Please verify your identity.
invalid_status: This action is not possible in the current session state.
purchase_invalid: The purchase information provided is invalid. Please check and try again.
steps_incomplete: Please complete all steps before submitting your test.
not_involved: You do not have access to this session.
not_owner: You can only manage your own sessions.
already_applied: You have already applied to this campaign.
applied_success: Your application has been submitted successfully.
submitted_success: Your test has been submitted successfully.
completed_success: The session has been completed successfully.
purchase_submitted_success: Your proof of purchase has been submitted.
price_invalid: The price is invalid or validation is not possible.
tier_insufficient: Your current tier does not allow you to apply to this campaign.
criteria_not_met: You do not meet the required criteria for this campaign.
